violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance and the side of the bar, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The flip top prep unit was observed in poor repair (not maintaining ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below). The unit is to not be used until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar and kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
The ceiling in the main bar area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2025
